title: Adventures, Dungeon and Weapons
description:
Are you sick of the ordinary Minecraft?
Then try this mod pack!
body:
Are you sick of the ordinary Minecraft?
Then try this mod pack!
Various dungeons, bosses and weapons are added!
Explore the wide world and defeat strong bosses!
You can also feel like you're playing RPG games with a variety of combat skills added

Beat the various bosses, get the various weapons and be the powerhouse of the RPG world!
